ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season during which the game was played */,
  "day_num" INTEGER /* Day number of the season */,
  "w_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "w_score" INTEGER /* Score of the winning team */,
  "l_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "l_score" INTEGER /* Score of the losing team */,
  "w_loc" TEXT /* Location of the game (H for home, N for neutral) */,
  "num_ot" INTEGER /* Number of overtime periods played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the game was played */,
  "day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day in the season */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_w_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("w_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_id") REFERENCES days ("day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_l_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("l_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport played in the league (e.g., basketball, football) */,
  "league_founded" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  "league_president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league president */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_league_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_president_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., point guard, quarterback) */,
  "player_birthdate" TEXT /* Player's birthdate */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Player's height in centimeters */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "player_country" TEXT /* Player's country of origin */,
  "player_jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "player_contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "player_contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the team */,
  "field_goal_percentage" TEXT /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" TEXT /* Three-point percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" TEXT /* Free throw percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "three_point_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-point shots made */,
  "three_point_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-point shots attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach, player) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  "date_granted" TEXT /* Date the access was granted */,
  "date_revoked" TEXT /* Date the access was revoked (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  "season_mvp_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the most valuable player */,
  "season_standing" TEXT /* Final standings of the teams in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_season_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_season_mvp_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_mvp_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "days" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "day_num" INTEGER /* Day number of the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the day */,
  "day_type" TEXT /* Type of the day (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "day_description" TEXT /* Description of the day (e.g., holiday, special event) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_days_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "location_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location */,
  "location_website" TEXT /* Official website of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the location (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
